summary: Completed testing of Blendlink iteration 34 features: Million Dollar RPS Bidding Auction, enhanced AI photo analysis with light_types, photo stamina system, and PvP matchmaking. All 15 backend tests pass. Frontend Battle Arena UI verified with photo selection, stamina display, and dollar value sorting.

ui_bugs.issue: Frontend shows '30s' timeout but backend is set to 5s - UI mismatch

integration_issues.issue: Frontend may get stuck in 'searching' state even after backend creates bot match. User needs to refresh or the polling may miss the status update.

passed_tests: Game Config: /api/photo-game/config includes rps_auction settings (starting_bankroll=$10M, min_bid=$1M, max_bid=$5M)
Minting Config: /api/minting/config includes light_types (sunlight_fire, rain_snow_ice, darkness_night)
Minting Config: Rating criteria with weights sum to 100%
Minting Status: /api/minting/status returns can_mint, mints_today, daily_limit
Battle Photos: /api/photo-game/battle-photos returns photos sorted by dollar_value descending
Battle Photos: Photos include stamina, stamina_percent, is_available, battles_remaining
PvP Queue Status: /api/photo-game/pvp/queue-status returns players_waiting, active_matches
PvP Find Match: /api/photo-game/pvp/find-match with photo_id works
RPS Auction: Start game creates session with $10M bankroll for both players
RPS Auction: /api/photo-game/session/{id}/rps-auction accepts choice and bid_amount
RPS Auction: Invalid bids (below $1M or above $5M) are rejected with 400 error
Photo Battle: Full game flow (RPS Auction -> Photo Battle -> Result) works
frontend_tests_passed: Battle Arena: Page loads with 'Dollar Auction Arena' title
Battle Arena: Subtitle shows 'Million Dollar RPS + Photo Battles'
Battle Arena: Stats bar shows Wins, Losses, BL Won, Stamina
Battle Arena: Photo selection UI shows 'Select Your Battle Photo'
Battle Arena: Photos sorted by Dollar Value with 'Higher value = stronger!' hint
Battle Arena: Photo card shows name, dollar value ($86.8M), scenery type (Water)
Battle Arena: Stamina display shows percentage and battles remaining (82%, 19 battles)
Battle Arena: Strength indicator shows 'Strong vs Man-made'
Battle Arena: Battle Settings shows queue status, BL Coin Bet input, bot fallback toggle
Battle Arena: Find Match button enabled when photo selected
action_items: MINOR: Update frontend matchmaking timeout display from 30s to 5s to match backend MATCHMAKING_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
MINOR: Investigate frontend polling - may need to increase polling frequency or add immediate status check after timeout
critical_code_review_comments: Million Dollar RPS Auction implemented correctly with $10M starting bankroll, $1M-$5M bids
Light types (sunlight_fire, rain_snow_ice, darkness_night) added to minting system with strength/weakness relationships
Rating criteria now have weights totaling 100% for fair photo valuation
Photo stamina system works correctly (100% = 24 battles, regenerates ~4.16%/hour)
Matchmaking timeout reduced to 5 seconds for faster bot matches
BL coin bet deduction on join and refund on cancel working correctly
seed_data_creation: Using existing test photo 'Test Battle Photo 1' (mint_c57f08fdaf194e52) with Water scenery, $86.8M value, 82% stamina
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified: 1) Million Dollar RPS Bidding Auction with $10M bankroll, $1M-$5M bids, race to 3 wins, 2) Enhanced AI photo analysis with light_type (sunlight_fire, rain_snow_ice, darkness_night), 3) Weighted rating criteria (totals 100%), 4) Photo stamina system (100% = 24 battles), 5) Reduced matchmaking timeout to 5 seconds. Test user has 1 minted photo 'Test Battle Photo 1' with ~82% stamina. Minor UI issue: frontend shows 30s timeout but backend is 5s.
